zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth於1129年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Anschetil de Bulmer60歲，母親Sybilia Humez50歲。他與Emma Fossard結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1154年被列為sheriff of yorkshire。他去世於1166年在英國英格蘭達勒姆布朗加斯享年37歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆布朗加斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bulmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from either of two places called Bulmer, in the North Yorkshire and Essex, or from Boulmer in Northumberland. The Yorkshire place, recorded in Domesday Book as Bolemere, is named in Old English with bula ‘bull’ + mere ‘lake’, as is Boulmer; the Essex placename, found in early records as Bulenemera, is from bulena (genitive plural of bula) + mere ‘lake’.

variants.name: Bolmer
meanings: Dutch: probably from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldemar, composed of the elements bald ‘bold’ + mar ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: Bertram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. Ravens were traditional symbols of wisdom in Germanic mythology; Odin was regularly accompanied by ravens called Hugin and Munin. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. See also Bertrand .

en.lifeSummary: When Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth was born in 1129, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Anschetil de Bulmer, was 60 and his mother, Sybilia Humez, was 50. He married Emma Fossard. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1154, his occupation is listed as sheriff of yorkshire. He died in 1166, in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Brancepeth, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth est né en 1129, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Anschetil de Bulmer, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Sybilia Humez, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Emma Fossard. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1154, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of yorkshire. Il est décédé en 1166, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre.

de.Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, England: Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth 1129 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anschetil de Bulmer 60 und seine Mutter Sybilia Humez 50. Er hat Emma Fossard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1154 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of yorkshire aufgeführt. Er starb 1166 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brancepeth, Durham, England begraben.

Lui sposato Emma Fossard. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1154, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of yorkshire. Morì nel 1166, nel Brancepeth, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Brancepeth, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepethが1129年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Anschetil de Bulmerは60歳，母Sybilia Humezは50歳であった。Emma Fossardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1154年，職業はsheriff of yorkshireと記録されている。彼は1166年にイギリスイギリスダルハムブランセペスで37歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムブランセペスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth(이)가 1129년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anschetil de Bulmer(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybilia Humez(은)는 50세였다. 그는 Emma Fossard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1154년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of yorkshire이었다. 그는 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 브랜스프스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth nasceu em 1129, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Anschetil de Bulmer, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Sybilia Humez, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Fossard. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1154, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of yorkshire. Ele faleceu em 1166, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra.

ro.Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, England: Hutton Mulgrave, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth родился в 1129 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Anschetil de Bulmer было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybilia Humez, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Fossard. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1154 году он работал по профессии sheriff of yorkshire. Он умер в 1166 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth nació en 1129, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Anschetil de Bulmer, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Sybilia Humez, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Emma Fossard. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1154, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of yorkshire. Murió en 1166, en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra.
